strm_coverage: DCWF WR624 (55 elements, 60 KSAs scored ≥3) + DDaT Data Engineer (11 skills, 30 KSAs scored ≥3).
natural_threshold: Strength=8 (subset_of) = strong includes. Strength=5 (intersects_with) = conditional on web evidence + seniority test. Strength=3 = excluded unless exceptional evidence.
